query_title: Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid

recommendations.title: The Sting
recommendations.overview: A novice con man teams up with an acknowledged master to avenge the murder of a mutual friend by pulling off the ultimate big con and swindling a fortune from a big-time mobster.

recommendations.title: Slap Shot
recommendations.overview: To build up attendance at their games, the management of a struggling minor-league hockey team signs up the Hanson Brothers, three hard-charging players whose job is to demolish the opposition.

recommendations.title: The World According to Garp
recommendations.overview: A struggling young writer finds his life and work dominated by his unfaithful wife and his radical feminist mother, whose best-selling manifesto turns her into a cultural icon.

recommendations.title: Funny Farm
recommendations.overview: Sportswriter Andy Farmer moves with his schoolteacher wife Elizabeth to the country in order to write a novel in relative seclusion. Of course, seclusion is the last thing the Farmers find in the small, eccentric town, where disaster awaits them at e

recommendations.title: Slaughterhouse-Five
recommendations.overview: Billy Pilgrim, a veteran of the Second World War, finds himself mysteriously detached from time, so that he is able to travel, without being able to help it, from the days of his childhood to those of his peculiar life on a distant planet called Tral

recommendations.title: Sweet Country
recommendations.overview: In 1929, an Australian Aboriginal stockman kills a white station owner in self-defense and goes on the lam, pursued by a posse.

recommendations.title: Lucky Luke and the Daltons
recommendations.overview: Joe and Averell are the eldest and youngest of the four Dalton brothers, the worst outlaws in Wild West history...

recommendations.title: The Wild Bunch
recommendations.overview: An aging group of outlaws look for one last big score as the "traditional" American West is disappearing around them.

recommendations.title: Slow West
recommendations.overview: In the Old West, a 17-year-old Scottish boy teams up with a mysterious gunman to find the woman with whom he is infatuated.

recommendations.title: High Plains Drifter
recommendations.overview: A gunfighting stranger comes to the small settlement of Lago. After gunning down three gunmen who tried to kill him, the townsfolk decide to hire the Stranger to hold off three outlaws who are on their way.
